creator: rod@zort.on.ca
text:
Gnomecore has been updated from 1.0.53 to 1.0.54.  Basically a bugfix release.

None of the distribution files appears to have changed.  New version compiles fine without changing anything else (including the patches).

Fix: 

Set: (/usr/ports/x11/gnomecore)

DISTNAME=	gnome-core-1.0.54
PKGNAME=	gnomecore-1.0.54

and make fetch; make makesum
